tenants.tagline: A Southwest Florida yard, handled — weekly maintenance and landscaping.

opportunities.niche: Aesthetic, functional foraging tools and digital guides for urban wildcrafters
opportunities.rationale: This market is growing rapidly and demonstrates demand for both physical tools and digital knowledge. By offering a curated line of aesthetically pleasing yet highly functional foraging tools (physical product) combined with comprehensive, modern digital guides (info-product/newsletter), Day14 can serve a community looking to combine their love for nature with a contemporary lifestyle.

opportunities.niche: Secure and private integration of AI tools for individuals and small businesses.
opportunities.rationale: The rapid adoption of AI has created a significant privacy paradox: immense utility versus substantial data risk. Many users are hesitant to input sensitive information into public AI models. A SaaS solution that acts as a privacy-preserving intermediary directly addresses this pain point, enabling secure AI usage without compromising confidentiality, a critical need for individuals and small busi

opportunities.niche: Curated sensory and organizational boxes for neurodivergent adults
opportunities.rationale: This opportunity directly addresses a significant underserved market by providing curated, adult-focused sensory and organizational tools via a recurring subscription model. The subscription box fosters product discovery and builds a strong sense of community and belonging among subscribers. A solo founder can leverage dropshipping or strategic partnerships for initial product sourcing, focusing o

opportunities.niche: High-quality, aesthetic sleep aids for enhanced rest and hair/skin health
opportunities.rationale: The significant year-over-year growth for specific sleep aids like mouth tape and sleep bonnets indicates a clear and rising consumer demand. By focusing on high-quality, aesthetic products and curating them into a 'luxury sleep system,' we can differentiate from generic offerings and appeal to the growing self-care market. This approach allows for strong brand building and cross-selling opportuni

opportunities.niche: ESG and due diligence compliance for small to medium suppliers.
opportunities.rationale: As large companies face mandatory ESG and supply chain due diligence reporting, they will push these requirements down to their smaller suppliers. SMB suppliers need affordable, practical tools and guidance to understand these demands, collect necessary data, and provide compliant documentation to retain business. This creates a strong demand for productized solutions that demystify complex ESG re

opportunities.niche: Simplified US state data privacy compliance for small businesses.
opportunities.rationale: The proliferation of distinct state data privacy laws (e.g., CCPA/CPRA, TDPSA, OCPA, DPDPA) creates an urgent, ongoing demand for simplified compliance guidance and tools for SMBs. These businesses cannot afford expensive legal counsel or enterprise software, making affordable, actionable info-products highly valuable for navigating this complex regulatory environment.

opportunities.niche: AI-generated/augmented design templates and content frameworks for solopreneurs
opportunities.rationale: AI is a dominant trend, but many tools are either too complex or too generic for solo founders. By offering curated, AI-augmented design templates and content frameworks specifically for solopreneurs, we can provide significant time-saving and quality-boosting solutions. This leverages Day14's automation stack for design generation and caters to the demand for digital products and personalized sol

opportunities.niche: Personalized online shopping and tech assistance for seniors
opportunities.rationale: This niche leverages the significant online presence and spending power of seniors while addressing their documented pain points around usability and trust. An agency model allows for personalized, high-touch service that builds confidence and loyalty, leading to recurring revenue. The solo founder can start with a small client base and scale by refining processes and potentially incorporating AI

opportunities.niche: Comfortable, stylish, and sensitive-skin friendly piercing jewelry and aftercare
opportunities.rationale: The substantial growth in flat-back earrings highlights a widespread unmet need for comfortable piercing solutions. By offering both modern, sensitive-skin-friendly jewelry and comprehensive, gentle aftercare products, we can create a trusted brand that solves common pain points (discomfort, irritation, removal for sleep) for a growing demographic of piercing enthusiasts and parents.

opportunities.niche: Verifying ethical and sustainable fashion claims amidst widespread greenwashing.
opportunities.rationale: Consumers are overwhelmed by conflicting 'sustainable' claims and deeply distrustful of brands due to widespread greenwashing. A specialized newsletter provides a low-overhead, high-value solution for a solo founder to deliver deeply researched, transparent, and actionable information, helping consumers make genuinely ethical fashion choices and building a loyal community.

opportunities.niche: Stylish, modern casual wear for plus-size men (2XL-6XL+)
opportunities.rationale: Despite a massive market size and clear online buying behavior, plus-size men's fashion often defaults to basic, uninspired styles. This niche offers a significant opportunity to provide trend-driven, comfortable, and well-fitting casual clothing. A solo founder can start with a Print-on-Demand (POD) model to test designs and build an audience quickly, eventually transitioning to more specialized

opportunities.niche: Meal plans, recipes, and curated grocery lists for chronic gut health conditions.
opportunities.rationale: This niche taps into a highly motivated audience with a clear, persistent problem not fully addressed by supplement companies. An info-product model allows for rapid creation and distribution of high-value digital assets (meal plans, recipe packs) that directly solve this pain point. This can be expanded into a subscription newsletter or even a course on 'cooking for your gut.'

opportunities.niche: Practical EU AI Act compliance for small AI developers and deployers.
opportunities.rationale: The EU AI Act is a complex, extraterritorial regulation impacting many businesses developing or deploying AI in the EU, with significant compliance requirements and staggered deadlines. Smaller AI companies or teams lack the resources for large consulting firms but urgently need practical, affordable guidance and tools (e.g., templates, checklists) to navigate risk classification, documentation, a

opportunities.niche: Genuinely safe & transparent pet food alternatives after recalls
opportunities.rationale: The consistent stream of pet food recalls has created a significant void in consumer trust. Pet owners view their animals as family and are highly motivated to find safe, reliable food. A brand built on extreme transparency and verifiable safety directly addresses this unmet demand, offering a premium alternative to compromised mass-market options.

opportunities.niche: Specialized aesthetic tools and info products for niche TTRPG Game Masters
opportunities.rationale: This community is highly engaged and actively creates and consumes content for specific game systems. Offering curated info products like advanced worldbuilding templates, campaign modules, or specialized GM guides for niche TTRPGs, combined with aesthetically matching physical props (via physical-product or pod-store), can tap into this deep passion. opportunities.niche: Curated products and advice for senior pets and pets with allergies/sensitivities.
opportunities.rationale: This niche capitalizes on the deep emotional bond between owners and their special-needs pets, leading to high willingness to pay. opportunities.rationale: There is a strong and growing segment of fiber artists who prioritize sustainability and natural materials but struggle to find high-quality, transparently sourced, and naturally dyed options. This opportunity allows a solo founder to curate unique products, build a strong brand story around ethical values, and engage directly with passionate online communities. opportunities.niche: AI-powered multi-platform content repurposing for niche businesses
opportunities.rationale: There's clear demand from small businesses and creators to efficiently repurpose content, with AI acting as a key enabler. The existing gap is not just general AI content generation, but structured, niche-specific workflows and templates that guide users through the *strategic adaptation* process for multiple platforms, ensuring brand consistency and adherence to platform best practices. opportunities.niche: Premium festival/rave culture gear — multi-day endurance + recovery focus
opportunities.rationale: Gap: most rave merch is throwaway novelty (Amazon $8 LED glasses, party-store kandi). Underserved is the *endurance angle* — multi-day festival gear marketed to adults: cooling gear, electrolyte packs, hearing protection that looks cool, recovery merch.

opportunities.niche: AI prompt management & optimization for small teams and solopreneurs
opportunities.rationale: The pain point of inconsistent AI outputs and the challenge of managing effective prompts are significant and widely acknowledged by AI users. While many enterprise-level prompt management tools exist, they are often overly complex, expensive, and not designed for the specific needs of small teams and solopreneurs. opportunities.niche: Affordable AI-generated niche market research reports for SMBs
opportunities.rationale: There is a significant cost barrier preventing SMBs from accessing quality, niche-specific market research. While general AI tools exist, they typically lack the specific focus and structured analytical frameworks required for deep niche insights and actionable recommendations. opportunities.rationale: This niche has a deeply passionate, active community willing to invest in their hobby. A pod-store can quickly launch branded merchandise with modern designs, appealing to the aesthetic preferences of this demographic. This can be expanded with info-products (e.g., detailed repair guides for specific machines) or curated physical products (e.g., specialized diagnostic tools or reproduction parts)

human_todos.title: Get an Anthropic API key — unblocks all agent builds
human_todos.detail: Builds (Kennum and every future business) keep dying on the Gemini 429 quota. The durable fix is the Claude fallback, now wired into the whole bootstrap chain — it just needs a key. Generate one at console.anthropic.com -> Settings -> API Keys (requires enabling API billing). Then paste the key to Claude; Claude will add it to .env.local + Vercel and re-run the Kennum build for you.

human_todos.title: Add MAILERLITE_API_KEY to .env.local + Vercel
human_todos.detail: Newsletter signup on day14.us and every brand site stays inert until this key is set. Get it from mailerlite.com -> Integrations -> Developers -> API, then paste it to Claude to wire in.

human_todos.title: Publish the 10 Hot Flash Co product drafts in Printify
human_todos.detail: Agents generated 10 menopause-humor mug designs and created the product drafts. Open Printify -> Hot Flash Co -> publish them to the Pop-Up Store so they go live.

human_todos.title: Confirm Kennum Lawn Care's real phone, service area + pricing
human_todos.detail: The Kennum site is live with starting-at price estimates and a quote form (no phone listed yet). Send Claude the real business phone number, the exact SWFL towns served, and confirmed pricing so the site shows real numbers instead of estimates. Source of truth: src/app/brands/kennum-lawn-care/theme.ts.

human_todos.title: Generate brand identity for Hot Flash Co
human_todos.detail: hot-flash-co has no brand-identity.json, so its site falls back to default colors and fonts. Run: node scripts/brand-identity-generator.mjs --slug hot-flash-co --display-name "Hot Flash Co" --niche "Real goods for the seasons no one warns you about."

human_todos.title: Publish blog content for Hot Flash Co
human_todos.detail: No blog drafts exist yet for hot-flash-co, so the blog page is empty. The daily content engine generates them; confirm its LaunchAgent is installed, then review and mark drafts status: live.
